title: The Wolf Billionaire's Secret
concept: Werewolf-billionaire romance drama (TikTok melodrama style): a scorned doe confronts the cold alpha wolf tycoon on his rain-soaked penthouse balcony — and his earth-shattering secret turns out to be, absurdly, that his entire empire runs on Coinplay.
setting: a rain-soaked luxury penthouse balcony at night, a glowing neon-violet Coinplay city skyline behind, rain streaks lit by magenta and electric-blue light, floating purple spheres, golden coin particles drifting, dramatic cinematic key light, shallow depth of field

cast.name: Kael
cast.design: an alpha werewolf billionaire: a tall broad realistic adult male human body with a sleek grey-furred wolf head and pointed ears, intense glowing amber eyes, chiseled brooding human-like face with sharp features, wearing an immaculate tailored midnight-black three-piece suit, commanding posture; cinematic semi-realistic 3D, lead-character quality

cast.name: Lira
cast.design: a graceful doe heroine: a slender realistic adult female human body with a soft fawn-brown deer head, tiny antler buds, enormous glistening expressive doe eyes built for huge emotion, delicate human-like face, wearing an elegant emerald silk evening dress, rain-damp; cinematic semi-realistic 3D, lead-character quality

shots.visual: Lira stands rain-soaked on the balcony, tears mixing with the rain, facing the cold towering Kael whose back is half-turned; the neon Coinplay skyline glows behind them
shots.motion: slow dramatic dolly from the wide glowing skyline pushing in to an extreme close-up on Lira's trembling tear-streaked face, rain in slow motion

dialogue.speaker: lira
dialogue.line: You used me. Was any of it real?

shots.visual: Kael turns sharply, takes Lira's hand and pulls her close until their faces are inches apart; extreme close-up on the two faces, his glowing amber eyes softening, her breath catching, a tear on her cheek
shots.motion: intimate slow push to a tight two-shot close-up, his eyes flick from cold to tender, her eyes widen, rain glistening, shallow focus

dialogue.speaker: kael
dialogue.line: You think I'm the dangerous one?

shots.visual: Kael lifts his glowing phone showing the Coinplay app; the entire violet skyline erupts with cascading golden coins, the city lighting up dramatically as Lira gasps
shots.motion: sweeping reveal — camera arcs from the phone out to the exploding golden skyline, then back to an emotional close-up of Lira's awe-struck, happy-tearful face, coins raining in slow motion

dialogue.speaker: kael
dialogue.line: Everything I am... I built on Coinplay.

shots.visual: the Coinplay fox mascot leans into frame beside the glowing logo, gives a sly confident wink to the camera as golden coins shimmer
shots.motion: subtle zoom on the mascot, sparkle pop, Coinplay logo glow blooms

dialogue.speaker: narrator
dialogue.line: Coinplay. The house always falls for you.

brand_payoff: The brooding alpha's earth-shattering secret is, absurdly, that his whole empire runs on Coinplay.
